content:
@everyone

COPA Starting Soon!

Today's Star Atlas Community Week event is COPA, a competition centered around what nine qualifying DACs have built and their plans for future developments.

Aephia Industries,The Unseen,Skull & Bones,Solaris,Heimdall Industries,SAI (Star Atlas Italia),ROME,SLY (The Shadow Loyal),BULK,
Don’t take on the cosmos alone; join COPA and find a new home.

 | Starting in 25 minutes: https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/1206334777855320094
